name: Lemon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the sugar, flour, cornstarch, and salt together.
2. Gradually add the boiling water while stirring constantly using high heat until the mixture begins to thicken.
3. Continue cooking on low heat until thick, stirring constantly.
4. Add the beaten egg yolks and cook for 2 more minutes on low heat.
5. Stir in the lemon juice and grated rind.
6. Allow the filling to cool completely.
7. Pour into the previously baked pie shell.
8. Cover with meringue (recipe above).
9. Makes one 9-inch pie.
